title: DevPackagesConfig
description: Configuration for development repositories to link into this repo via yalc. The DevRepo and DevPackage types in dev-package-utils.ts mirror this schema — if you change one, update the other.

repos.description: List of development repositories to link into this repo via yalc.

DevRepo.description: A development repository containing one or more packages that can be linked into this repo via yalc.

folder.description: The directory name of the repo, used as both the clone destination under dev-packages/ and the sibling-directory fallback name.

cloneUrl.description: The git clone URL for the repo, used when the repo is not already present locally.

revision.description: The git revision (branch name, tag, or commit hash) to check out before building.

devPackages.description: The packages within this repo to publish and link.

DevPackage.description: A package within a dev repo that can be published locally via yalc and linked into this repo.

devpubTarget.description: The nx project name passed to `nx devpub <target>` to publish this package.

repoLinkScript.description: The npm script prefix in this repo used to link/unlink the package, e.g. `editor` maps to `editor:link` and `editor:unlink`.
